content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

May 22, 2007


Gary L. Bostwick
Bostwick & Jassy LLP
12400 Wilshire Boulevard, Suite 400
Los Angeles, CA 90025

RE: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. A-07-009

Dear Mr. Bostwick:

Pursuant to your letter of May 18, 2007, your request for advice on behalf of
Arianna Huffington and her committee, Arianna for Governor, has been withdrawn.

If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: William J. Lenkeit
Senior Counsel, Legal Division

WJL:jl
I:\AdviceLtrs\07-009

embedding.qa_text: The letter is from the Fair Political Practices Commission to Gary L. Bostwick, regarding his request for advice on behalf of Arianna Huffington and her committee, Arianna for Governor. The Commission informs Mr. Bostwick that the request has been withdrawn. If he has other questions, he should contact them at (916) 322-5660. Sincerely, Scott Hallabrin General Counsel By: William J. Denkeit Senior Counsel, Legal Division
